description: Specify KFACTORS to determine transformer reactive power losses due to geomagnetic currents (GICs) flow. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.2.1. ierr = gic_mvarloss_scaling_factors(kfactors)

parameters.name: kfactors
parameters.description: An array of 9 elements specifying Kfactor values. The values are as follows. (input).

kfactors.description: Voltage level at which these kfactors are specified.
kfactor value for Shell form transformers.
kfactor value for core design - Single Phase (three separate cores) transformers.
kfactor value for core design - Three Phase 3 legged core form transformers.
kfactor value for core design - Three Phase 5 legged core form transformers.
kfactor value for core design - Three Phase 7 legged core form transformers.
kfactor value for unknown core, voltage level of <=200 kV.
kfactor value for unknown core, voltage level of <200 kV and <=400 kV.
kfactor value for unknown core, voltage level of >400 kV.

error_codes.description: DLL not loaded or entry point not found.
